Delegate the next stretch of the tree to a subagent. Exit token: DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b. Failure token: DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b__FAILED. ORDERING — submit success for THIS step BEFORE spawning the subagent, because the runtime advances the cursor only on submit. Otherwise the subagent's first `abtree next` would return this same instruct. Use model: "haiku". If your harness does not support model selection, ignore this hint. BRIEF: Write the literal string "ok" to the delegate output slot. Driver-only walk — no subagent is actually spawned. Procedure: (1) Call `abtree submit <execution> success` for this step now. (2) Spawn a subagent with this brief: drive `abtree next/eval/submit` on this execution. For evaluates, read every referenced $LOCAL/$GLOBAL path from the store before calling `abtree eval`. When you process an instruct named `Return_To_Parent_Delegate_Round_Trip`, follow its text: submit success for that step, then return ONLY the literal token `DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b` to your parent and do not call `abtree next` again. If `abtree next` ever returns `{status:"done"}` or `{status:"failure"}`, return ONLY the literal token `DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b__FAILED`. (3) Block on the subagent. (4) Verify the returned reply equals exactly `DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b`. Any other reply (including `DLG__Delegate_Round_Trip__a94a036b__FAILED` or extra text) means the scope failed — surface that and stop driving. (5) On successful verification, call `abtree next` to receive the next post-scope action.
